untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'ATR expansion vs. 20-period MA average' ratio calculation and 'range(high-low) < 0.75x average range' sideways detection logic, which cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons with allowed operators. These require custom computed fields (rolling range averages and multi-period ATR ratios) not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated core ADX trend confirmation and price position relative to 50-MA. ATR expansion represented as atr_20 > 1.3 (approximation of expansion ratio). Sideways detection condition omitted due to complexity. Exit condition on ADX < 20 captures trend weakening. Signal is regime-adaptive (CONTEXT_DEPENDENT) supporting both long and short entries based on price position relative to MA.
